---
title: "Site usage"
format:
  dashboard:
    css:
      - ../dashboard-common.css
      - dashboard-site-usage.css
    expandable: false
author: "Dr Moritz Mähr"
description: "Historic Matomo usage summary for the NAIF website."
image: images/dashboard-screenshot.png
image-alt: "Screenshot of the site usage dashboard with overview metrics and traffic source table"
image-caption: "Dashboard screenshot from the NAIF website, captured on 2026-04-23."
date: 2026-04-22
date-modified: 2026-04-23
draft: false
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import json
import sys
from datetime import datetime
from html import escape

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML, display

sys.path.insert(0, "..")

from _common import render_table
from _matomo_usage import SNAPSHOT_PATH, format_duration, format_month_label


def format_number(value: object) -> str:
    """Format integer-like values for display."""
    try:
        return f"{int(value):,}"
    except (TypeError, ValueError):
        return "-"


def format_iso_timestamp(value: str | None) -> str:
    """Format an ISO timestamp as ``D Month YYYY, HH:MM UTC``."""
    if not value:
        return "-"

    normalised = value.replace("Z", "+00:00")
    parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(normalised)
    return f"{parsed.day} {parsed.strftime('%B %Y, %H:%M UTC')}"


def make_bar_cell(value: int, max_value: int) -> str:
    """Render a horizontal bar with a numeric label."""
    width = 0 if max_value <= 0 else max(4.0, (100.0 * value) / max_value)
    return (
        '<div class="usage-bar">'
        '<div class="usage-bar-track">'
        f'<span class="usage-bar-fill" style="width:{width:.1f}%"></span>'
        "</div>"
        f'<span class="usage-bar-label">{format_number(value)}</span>'
        "</div>"
    )


if SNAPSHOT_PATH.exists():
    snapshot = json.loads(SNAPSHOT_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
else:
    snapshot = {
        "status": "missing_config",
        "message": "Usage data snapshot not found.",
        "generated_at": None,
        "report_start_date": None,
        "report_end_date": None,
        "totals": None,
        "traffic_sources": [],
        "history": [],
        "top_pages": [],
    }

status = snapshot.get("status", "missing_config")
message = snapshot.get("message") or ""
totals = snapshot.get("totals") or {}
traffic_sources = snapshot.get("traffic_sources") or []
history = snapshot.get("history") or []
top_pages = snapshot.get("top_pages") or []
report_start_date = snapshot.get("report_start_date") or "-"
report_end_date = snapshot.get("report_end_date") or "-"
generated_at = format_iso_timestamp(snapshot.get("generated_at"))

overview_intro = (
    "This dashboard summarises Matomo usage for the NAIF website across the full "
    "available reporting window. It focuses on visits, page views, traffic sources, "
    "top pages, and month-by-month history."
)

if status == "ok" and totals:
    metrics_html = f"""
    <div class="dashboard-metrics">
      <div class="dashboard-metric">
        <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{format_number(totals.get('visits'))}</div>
        <div class="dashboard-metric-label">Visits</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dashboard-metric">
        <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{format_number(totals.get('pageviews'))}</div>
        <div class="dashboard-metric-label">Page views</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dashboard-metric">
        <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{format_number(totals.get('outlinks'))}</div>
        <div class="dashboard-metric-label">Outbound clicks</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dashboard-metric">
        <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{escape(format_duration(int(totals.get('avg_time_on_site_seconds', 0))))}</div>
        <div class="dashboard-metric-label">Average time on site</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dashboard-metric">
        <div class="dashboard-metric-value">{escape(str(totals.get('bounce_rate', '-')))}</div>
        <div class="dashboard-metric-label">Bounce rate</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    """
    state_html = (
        '<div class="dashboard-note">'
        f"Reporting window: <strong>{escape(report_start_date)}</strong> to "
        f"<strong>{escape(report_end_date)}</strong>. Snapshot refreshed on "
        f"<strong>{escape(generated_at)}</strong>."
        "</div>"
    )
else:
    metrics_html = ""
    empty_message = message or "Usage data are not available in this build."
    state_html = (
        '<div class="dashboard-note dashboard-note-warning">'
        f"{escape(empty_message)}"
        "</div>"
    )

overview_html = f"""
<div class="dashboard-about dashboard-static">
  <p>{escape(overview_intro)}</p>
  <p>
    The reporting window currently starts on <strong>{escape(report_start_date)}</strong>.
    A monthly breakdown is included below so longer-term changes remain visible instead of
    collapsing into a short rolling window.
  </p>
  <p>
    Matomo does not provide exact all-time unique visitor counts for arbitrary date ranges,
    so this dashboard emphasises metrics that remain reliable across the full reporting range.
  </p>
  {metrics_html}
  {state_html}
</div>
"""

if traffic_sources:
    max_source_visits = max(int(item.get("visits", 0)) for item in traffic_sources)
    traffic_source_rows = [
        {
            "Source": escape(str(item.get("label", "-"))),
            "Visits": make_bar_cell(int(item.get("visits", 0)), max_source_visits),
            "Share": escape(str(item.get("share", "-"))),
        }
        for item in traffic_sources
    ]
    traffic_sources_html = render_table(pd.DataFrame(traffic_source_rows))
else:
    traffic_sources_html = (
        '<p class="dashboard-empty-state">No traffic-source data are available in this build.</p>'
    )

if top_pages:
    max_pageviews = max(int(item.get("pageviews", 0)) for item in top_pages)
    top_page_rows = [
        {
            "Page": f'<a href="{escape(str(item.get("href", "/")))}">{escape(str(item.get("path", "/")))}</a>',
            "Page views": make_bar_cell(int(item.get("pageviews", 0)), max_pageviews),
            "Visits": format_number(item.get("visits", 0)),
            "Avg time on page": format_duration(int(item.get("avg_time_on_page_seconds", 0))),
            "Bounce rate": escape(str(item.get("bounce_rate", "-"))),
        }
        for item in top_pages
    ]
    top_pages_html = render_table(pd.DataFrame(top_page_rows))
else:
    top_pages_html = (
        '<p class="dashboard-empty-state">No page-level usage data are available in this build.</p>'
    )

if history:
    max_monthly_visits = max(int(item.get("visits", 0)) for item in history)
    monthly_rows = [
        {
            "Month": escape(format_month_label(str(item.get("month", "1970-01")))),
            "Visits": make_bar_cell(int(item.get("visits", 0)), max_monthly_visits),
            "Page views": format_number(item.get("pageviews", 0)),
            "Downloads": format_number(item.get("downloads", 0)),
            "Outbound clicks": format_number(item.get("outlinks", 0)),
            "Avg time on site": format_duration(int(item.get("avg_time_on_site_seconds", 0))),
            "Bounce rate": escape(str(item.get("bounce_rate", "-"))),
        }
        for item in history
    ]
    history_html = render_table(pd.DataFrame(monthly_rows))
else:
    history_html = (
        '<p class="dashboard-empty-state">No historic usage data are available in this build.</p>'
    )
```

## Row

### Column {.tabset}

#### Overview

```{python}
#| echo: false
display(HTML(overview_html))
```

```{=html}
<div class="dashboard-table-wrap">
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
display(HTML(traffic_sources_html))
```

```{=html}
</div>
```

#### Top pages

```{=html}
<div class="dashboard-table-wrap">
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
display(HTML(top_pages_html))
```

```{=html}
</div>
```

#### Monthly history

```{=html}
<div class="dashboard-table-wrap">
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
display(HTML(history_html))
```

```{=html}
</div>
```
